'''Gorbah''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] and the location of four secret fighter bases under control of a rogue group attempting to take out invading [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] forces. When they realized there was no hope in beating the Empire, they fled their bases immediately.

==Appearances==
*{{JournalCite|2|A World to Conquer}} {{1stm}}
